---
title: "Resources & Interactive Tools"
listing:
  id: resource-gallery
  contents: resources.yml
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
---

Welcome to the resources page. Here you will find interactive simulations, visual tools, and materials I use for teaching Physics and Mathematics.

:::{#resource-gallery}
:::
